title: Anthropic rents SpaceX?
summary: Anthropic partnered with SpaceX to access Colossus, a major GPU cluster. The analysis argues that Anthropic lacks vertical integration compared to competitors, relying on external partners for chips and infrastructure. The commentary suggests the AI competitive landscape is shifting toward infrastructure control rather than model benchmarks alone.
